name: Pop Art / Lichtenstein
description: Roy Lichtenstein 팝아트. Ben-Day 도트가 주인공, 원색(빨강/파랑/노랑/검정/흰색)만 사용, 두꺼운 검정 아웃라인, 플랫 컬러, 말풍선/생각풍선. 미술관 회고전 느낌.
source: Roy Lichtenstein retrospective, MoMA Pop Art collection, 1960s commercial art turned fine art

demo.title: POP ART
demo.subtitle: In the style of Lichtenstein
demo.speechBubble: WHY NOT TURN YOUR DESIGN INTO ART?
demo.thoughtBubble: I WONDER WHAT THIS WOULD LOOK LIKE AS A DESIGN SYSTEM...

suggestions.icons: Lucide (bold stroke 2.5px) or custom graphic pictograms
suggestions.components: speech bubbles, thought bubbles, Ben-Day dot backgrounds (3 sizes), thick-border panels, flat color cards, dot-patterned table rows
suggestions.avoid: shadows, gradients, thin borders, muted colors, pastels, any color outside red/blue/yellow/black/white
suggestions.texture: Ben-Day dots via radial-gradient at 3 sizes: large (14px grid, 5px radius), medium (10px grid, 2.5px radius), small (7px grid, 2px radius)
